sprite

visit.hpp

Go to the documentation of this file.
00001 
00005 #pragma once
00006 #include "sprite/node.hpp"
00007 
00008 namespace sprite
00009 {
00016   template<typename Visitor>
00017   inline typename Visitor::result_type
00018   visit(Visitor const & visitor, Node const & node)
00019   {
00020     switch(node.tag())
00021     {
00022       #define SPRITE_visit(tag,arity) \
00023           visitor(static_cast<meta::NodeOf<tag,arity>::type const &>(node));
00024 
00025       case FAIL:   return SPRITE_visit(FAIL,-1);
00026       case OPER:
00027       {
00028         switch(node.arity())
00029         {
00030           case 0:  return SPRITE_visit(OPER,0);
00031           case 1:  return SPRITE_visit(OPER,1);
00032           case 2:  return SPRITE_visit(OPER,2);
00033           default: return SPRITE_visit(OPER,-1);
00034         }
00035       }
00036       case CHOICE: return SPRITE_visit(CHOICE,-1);
00037       case FWD: return SPRITE_visit(FWD,-1);
00038       case INT:    return SPRITE_visit(INT,-1);
00039       case FLOAT:  return SPRITE_visit(FLOAT,-1);
00040       default:
00041       {
00042         assert(node.tag() >= CTOR);
00043         switch(node.arity())
00044         {
00045           case 0:  return SPRITE_visit(CTOR,0);
00046           case 1:  return SPRITE_visit(CTOR,1);
00047           case 2:  return SPRITE_visit(CTOR,2);
00048           default: return SPRITE_visit(CTOR,-1);
00049         }
00050       }
00051       #undef SPRITE_visit
00052     }
00053   }
00054 
00055   namespace detail
00056   {
00057     // Wraps a visitor object; removes const qualifiers from the node argument
00058     // before the visitor is called (safe, as used below).
00059     template<typename Visitor> struct UnwrapConst
00060     {
00061       typedef typename Visitor::result_type result_type;
00062       explicit UnwrapConst(Visitor const & visitor) : m_visitor(visitor) {}
00063     private:
00064       Visitor const & m_visitor;
00065     public:
00066       // Unary visitation.
00067       template<typename Payload>
00068       result_type operator()(Node_<Payload> const & node) const
00069         { return m_visitor(const_cast<Node_<Payload> &>(node)); }
00070 
00071       // Binary visitation.
00072       template<typename Payload0, typename Payload1>
00073       result_type operator()(
00074           Node_<Payload0> const & node0, Node_<Payload1> const & node1
00075         ) const
00076       {
00077         return m_visitor(
00078             const_cast<Node_<Payload0> &>(node0)
00079           , const_cast<Node_<Payload1> &>(node1)
00080           );
00081       }
00082     };
00083   }
00084 
00086   template<typename Visitor>
00087   inline typename Visitor::result_type
00088   visit(Visitor const & visitor, Node & node)
00089   {
00090     detail::UnwrapConst<Visitor> const unwrapper(visitor);
00091     return visit(unwrapper, static_cast<Node const &>(node));
00092   }
00093 
00094   namespace detail
00095   {
00096     // A helper for implementing the binary form of the visit function.  This
00097     // uses the unary visit to resolve each abstract Node argument
00098     // step-by-step.
00099     template<typename Visitor> struct BinaryVisitor
00100     {
00101       typedef typename Visitor::result_type result_type;
00102 
00103       // Two abstract args.
00104       result_type operator()(
00105           Visitor const & visitor, Node const & lhs, Node const & rhs
00106         ) const
00107       {
00108         return visit(
00109             tr1::bind<result_type>(*this, visitor, _1, tr1::ref(rhs))
00110           , lhs
00111           );
00112       }
00113 
00114       // One abstract arg.
00115       template<typename Lhs>
00116       result_type operator()(
00117           Visitor const & visitor, Lhs const & lhs, Node const & rhs
00118         ) const
00119       { return visit(tr1::bind<result_type>(*this, visitor, lhs, _1), rhs); }
00120 
00121       // Zero abstract args.
00122       template<typename Lhs, typename Rhs>
00123       result_type operator()(
00124           Visitor const & visitor, Lhs const & lhs, Rhs const & rhs
00125         ) const
00126       { return visitor(lhs, rhs); }
00127     };
00128   }
00129 
00140   template<typename Visitor>
00141   inline typename Visitor::result_type
00142   visit(Visitor const & visitor, Node const & lhs, Node const & rhs)
00143     { return detail::BinaryVisitor<Visitor>()(visitor, lhs, rhs); }
00144 
00146   template<typename Visitor>
00147   inline typename Visitor::result_type
00148   visit(Visitor const & visitor, Node & lhs, Node & rhs)
00149   {
00150     detail::UnwrapConst<Visitor> const unwrapper(visitor);
00151     return visit(unwrapper
00152       , static_cast<Node const &>(lhs), static_cast<Node const &>(rhs)
00153       );
00154   }
00155 }
